title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine Stir Fry
description: A Chinese-inspired twist on the classic North African dish. This stir-fry combines the rich flavors of a tagine with the tender crunch of a Chinese stir-fry.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add 1 tbsp of tunisian spice blend and stir to coat.
Add 1 cup of mixed vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, broccoli) and cook until tender.
Stir in 2 tbsp of creamy coconut cream and 1/4 cup of chopped pistachios.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
